basic_details.job_title: NIT Calicut Project Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Calicut (NIT Calicut) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 2 Project Associate-1 Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 10-06-2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical Engineering /Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation /Instrumentation & Control or Equivalent stream. Desirable: M.E./M.Tech in Electrical Engineering, Valid Gate Score.
qualification.details: Project Associate-1: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical Engineering /Electrical & Electronics Engineering / Electronics & Instrumentation /Instrumentation & Control or Equivalent stream from a recognized University or equivalent institution. | Desirable: M.E./M.Tech in Electrical Engineering, Valid Gate Score.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 37,000/- Per Month (Consolidated) +HRA for scholars having valid GATE score, Rs. 30,000/- Per Month (Consolidated) +HRA for scholars not having valid GATE Score.
salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- Per Month (Consolidated) +HRA (as per norms) for scholars having valid GATE score. Rs. 30,000/- Per Month (Consolidated) +HRA (as per norms) for scholars not having valid GATE Score.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Associate-1 position at NIT Calicut?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Project Associate-1 position at NIT Calicut is 10th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Project Associate-1 role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech degree in Electrical Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, Electronics & Instrumentation, or Instrumentation & Control, or an equivalent stream. A Master's degree and a valid GATE score are desirable.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Associate-1 position is 40 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Associate-1 post?
faq.answer: The salary is Rs. 37,000/- per month (consolidated) plus HRA for candidates with a valid GATE score, and Rs. 30,000/- per month (consolidated) plus HRA for those without a valid GATE score.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the Project Associate-1 position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to fill out the registration form, attach your CV, mark sheets, and certificates, and email them to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves an offline interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. When is the interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The interview for the Project Associate-1 position is scheduled for 13th June 2026.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application?
faq.answer: You need to submit the duly filled registration form, your most recent CV, and soft copies of mark sheets and certificates supporting your academic qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Project Associate-1 position is a contract-based role.
